meaning: adj.系统的,身体组织的,全身的
examples: They also aim to diminish systemic risk.
The problems are fundamental and systemic.
Even smallish banks can pose systemic dangers: Bear Stearns was not big, but it still warranted a rescue.
Mr. MORROW: These are systemic issues LAUSD needs to look at and not blame Norm Morrow, the principal.
